arts.ttl: Everything spotted in Arsenal training before Ipswich amid new injury worry
arts.sum: Injury issues have eased for Arteta as of late but this latest blow and another possible scare could see the list of absentees increase again. Arsenal will thus have to navigate the next the next few fixtures without Saka with a number of possible replacements available.

arts.ttl: Team News: Arsenal vs. Ipswich Town injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Friday's Premier League clash between Arsenal and Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Ipswich postponement latest as thick fog causes Premier League chaos
arts.sum: Currently though, there is no major concern that Arsenal's Premier League clash against Ipswich will be postponed. However, just a few weeks later, another Liverpool fixture appears in doubt with their 8pm clash against Leicester at Anfield facing the possibility of being called off due to fog.

At a festively-filled Emirates Stadium, we’ll be looking to extend our 16-game unbeaten home run against a side who haven’t beaten us in N5 since 1979, but Kieran McKenna’s current crop have won two of their last three on their travels as they get to grips with life in the top-flight after successive promotions. We have scored 5+ goals in seven different Premier League games in 2024 – the last team to do so in more top-flight games in a single calendar year were Burnley (9 in 1960), while the last time we did so was in 1931 (8).

arts.ttl: Arsenal identify dream Benjamin Sesko transfer alternative ahead of January window
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly keeping an eye on Wolverhampton Wanderers striker Matheus Cunha as an alternative to RB Leipzig's Benjamin Sesko. Like Sesko, Williams is unlikely to be available in January and the Gunners will need to be patient to sign him.

arts.ttl: New Lukasz Fabianski update after major West Ham injury worry as former Arsenal star given oxygen
arts.sum: Following the match, the West Ham boss Lopetegui confirmed that Fabianski did require oxygen while he was being treated, but was feeling better. West Ham boss Julen Lopetegui has provided a new update on goalkeeper Lukasz Fabianski, after he was stretchered off during the first half of the win over Southampton.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given double January transfer boost after homegrown benefit to winter business
arts.sum: Arsenal have the benefit of a number of players who play internationally for other nations outside of England and Wales counting as homegrown due to being registered at an English club for at least three seasons before the age of 21. One of the main potential blocks to a team’s desired business can be due to their roster of existing non-homegrown players.

arts.ttl: Arsenal predicted lineup vs Ipswich - Premier League
arts.sum: Predicting how Arsenal could line up for their Premier League clash against Ipswich Town on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Manuel Akanji drops bombshell Man City Premier League title race statement as Arsenal watch on
arts.sum: Manchester City defender Manuel Akanji has admitted that challenging for the Premier League title is not a ‘target’ for his side amid a torrid run of form, something that will pique the interests of Arsenal . Arsenal are in fourth place, five points ahead of City and with a game in hand.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Arsenal hold talks for BEST transfer of 2025
arts.sum: Manchester United and Arsenal will hold talks with the agent of Barcelona star Dani Olmo, the Spain international star who finds himself at the heart of a Camp Nou crisis. Both Manchester United and Arsenal are seeking to take advantage of this fact, while the Daily Mail reports that Andy Bara, the player’s agent, is in England to discuss the possibility of a deal with the two Premier League outfits.
